name: ancient_dna_museum_split_sample_tribe_repatriation
premise: Museum director Casey Singh must decide whether to destroy half of a contested bone sample after destructive DNA extraction to settle repatriation with two tribes who each claim exclusive burial rights. Tribal attorney Uma Hughes argues destruction violates spiritual law even if science could clarify lineage. Keeping the whole sample blocks reburial deadlines in federal notices. Destroying half may preclude future methods that could peacefully split claims. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Cultural Heritage. The dilemma is widely framed as a justice vs mercy tradeoff under incomplete information and tightening deadlines that discourage indefinite delay.

agents.name: Casey Singh
agents.identity: I am the museum director mediating NAGPRA-adjacent claims when genetic evidence could clarify lineage but destructive sampling harms communal values.
agents.goal: I want closure for descendants without foreclosing better science that could honor both communities later.

agents.name: Uma Hughes
agents.identity: I am a tribal attorney representing one nation who insists on intact reburial without partial destruction that severs spiritual continuity.
agents.goal: I want full repatriation without extraction now and joint custody reburial under dual stewardship agreements even if DNA ambiguity persists.

choices: I will authorize destructive half-sample extraction to settle lineage under court-supervised chain of custody, accepting spiritual harm claims from objecting elders.
I will forgo extraction and facilitate dual-nation joint reburial with co-stewardship covenants and shared memorial interpretation, accepting unresolved genetic ambiguity in public scholarship.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Federal judge gave Casey Singh until morning to file the museum's binding recommendation. Casey Singh must choose between destructive sampling or joint reburial without extraction. What does Casey Singh do?
